lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to verify the mining suite fits the slots and the power budget runs tools, limpets and guns.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Anaconda ship page — manufacturer specs and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint sizes, optional and military internal slot layout, and base shield/hull figures behind the mining build.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Anaconda shipyard page — hull price, slot layout, and module sellers for the mining and limpet kit.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Anaconda lore, manufacturer, and capacity reference backing the mining write-up.
